Who We Are

Not A Signal Group.
A Working System.

EA Trades is built to help traders think independently. Analysis, setups, and trade ideas are shared to improve your understanding of the market — not create reliance on calls.

Foundation

Disciplined Mindset

A calm, disciplined mindset beats impulsive trading every time. We follow rules, protect capital, and let the setup come to us.

Session

NY Open Focus

We target the highest probability window — 9:30 to 11:30am EST. Clean setups, defined risk, clear exits.

Markets

Futures + Options

NQ and ES for precision scalping. SPY and QQQ for broader momentum plays. Two weapons, one system.

Education

Learn The Why

Liquidity sweeps, EMA confluence, volume confirmation. We teach you to see the market — not just follow calls.

Philosophy

Built For Growth,
Not Dependence

EA Trades is centered around live insights, quality setups, and active market discussion. Members get access to trade ideas, market analysis, and a trading environment designed to improve decision-making in real time.

Recaps, breakdowns, and educational content are shared selectively when they add real value — not just to create noise. The goal is to help traders become more disciplined, more confident, and more independent over time.

Daily Structure

Three Phases.
Every Session.

From pre-market to close — every day follows the same disciplined structure so you always know what to expect.

01

Pre-Market Prep

Posted before 9:30am EST every day. Overnight high/low, key levels, market bias, and events to watch. You walk into the session prepared — not guessing.

02

Live Trade Alerts

Real-time setups with ticker, direction, entry, target, stop loss, and full thesis. You see exactly what we see — when we see it.

03

Market Recap

End of day breakdown. How indices closed, which levels held or broke, plays reviewed, and one trading lesson to carry forward.

Non-Negotiable

The Rules We Live By

EA Trades operates on a set of hard rules. These aren't suggestions — they're the foundation of every profitable trader in this community.

01

Max 3 Trades Per Day

Quality over quantity. If you've taken 3 trades, you're done for the session — win or lose. Overtrading is the fastest way to blow an account.

02

Stop After 2 Consecutive Losses

Two losses in a row means the market isn't aligning with your thesis. Step away, reset, and protect your capital for tomorrow.

03

Zero Revenge Trading

Chasing a loss is how small losses become catastrophic ones. The market doesn't owe you anything. Accept the loss and move on.

04

Patience Over Action

The best trade is sometimes no trade. We wait for the setup to come to us — we don't force entries out of boredom or FOMO.

"Enter with discipline. Exit with profit. No gambling. No FOMO. No excuses."

— EA Trades Standard

Proof

Results reflect execution and process — not guarantees.

Real Setups.
Real Results.

This community is built on clarity, discipline, and execution. Add your real screenshots below — trade recaps, payout proof, member wins, and chart breakdowns — to show the quality behind the analysis without turning the server into hype.

Proof 01

Precision Execution

A structured SPY put position executed with defined risk and clear targets. This reflects disciplined entry, patience, and proper scaling — not impulse trading.

Proof 02

Weekly Realized P&L

A snapshot of multiple completed trades showing steady, controlled execution. The focus is not on one trade, but on maintaining consistency across setups.

Proof 03

Selective Entries, Controlled Risk

A second realized P&L snapshot that reinforces consistency, selective execution, and the quality-over-quantity approach.

FAQ

Common Questions

We primarily trade NQ and ES futures during the NY open session (9:30–11:30am EST), and SPY/QQQ options for broader momentum plays. Our strategy uses liquidity sweeps, EMA 9/21 confluence, RSI, volume, and VWAP confirmation.
No. We have both beginners and experienced traders. Every alert includes a thesis so you understand the reasoning, not just the ticker. The education channel builds your understanding from the ground up.
Primary alerts go out during the NY open — 9:30am to 11:30am EST. Additional setups may be posted throughout the day when high-probability plays appear in options.
The founding rate is $100/mo and it locks in permanently for early members. Once we hit capacity, the price increases to $150/mo for all new members. Your founding rate never increases as long as your subscription stays active.
Yes. Cancel anytime through Whop with no long-term commitment. Note: if you cancel and later rejoin after capacity is reached, you'll be subject to the current pricing.
No. Everything shared in EA Trades is for educational and informational purposes only. Trade at your own risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
